properties.name: jwt.secret
properties.description: Secret key used for signing JWT tokens.

properties.name: jwt.expiration
properties.description: JWT access token expiration time in milliseconds.

properties.name: jwt.refresh-expiration
properties.description: Refresh token expiration time in milliseconds (default 7 days).

properties.name: ai.service.url
properties.description: Base URL of the Python LangGraph/FastAPI AI service.

properties.name: ai.service.enabled
properties.description: When true, ChatbotService tries the Python LangGraph service first and falls back to Gemini on failure.

properties.name: ai.service.internal-secret
properties.description: Shared secret sent as X-Internal-Token header to the Python AI service for service-to-service auth.

properties.name: stripe.api.key
properties.description: Stripe secret API key (sk_test_... or sk_live_...).
